obligations.rule: Validate basic email format with default options.
obligations.why: Ensure the function correctly identifies valid and invalid email formats.

obligations.rule: Support display name when allow_display_name is true.
obligations.why: Verify that the function correctly handles display names when explicitly allowed.

obligations.rule: Reject missing display name when require_display_name is true.
obligations.why: Ensure the function enforces the presence of a display name when required.

obligations.rule: Reject emails exceeding the maximum length unless ignore_max_length is true.
obligations.why: Ensure the function enforces length constraints unless explicitly overridden.

test_groups.title: Basic email validation with default options
test_groups.rationale: Covers basic email format validation and ensures non-string inputs are rejected.

test_groups.title: Allow display name in email
test_groups.rationale: Tests the handling of display names when explicitly allowed.

test_groups.title: Require display name in email
test_groups.rationale: Ensures that the function enforces the presence of a display name when required.

test_groups.title: Ignore maximum length constraint
test_groups.rationale: Tests behavior when the maximum length constraint is ignored.

test_groups.title: Reject emails exceeding maximum length
test_groups.rationale: Ensures that the validator enforces the maximum length constraint when not overridden.
